title: ButtonGroup
description: Groups several buttons into a single visual unit sharing variant, color and size. Supports horizontal and vertical orientation.

basic.title: Basic usage
basic.desc: Three grouped buttons sharing color and variant.

mixed.title: Mixed colors
mixed.desc: Each button can override the group color to highlight specific actions.

fullWidth.title: Full width
fullWidth.desc: The group expands to 100% and buttons share the width proportionally.

vertical.title: Vertical
vertical.desc: Stacks buttons in a column — useful for context menus or action lists.

icons.title: With icons
icons.desc: Icon-only grouped buttons for compact toolbars.

props.orientation: Axis along which the buttons are stacked.
props.variant: Visual variant inherited by all buttons in the group.
props.color: Semantic color applied to the buttons in the group.
props.size: Size shared by all buttons in the group.
props.radius: Border radius applied to the wrapper. Inner button corners collapse automatically.
props.disabled: Disables all buttons in the group.
props.gradient: Applies a subtle gradient compatible with the normal variant.

slots.default: List of <Button> components that belong to the group.
